title: Transplant shrubs and small trees
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Transplant shrubs and small trees demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for tree or shrub removal

pcs.text: Confirm transplanting instructions and activities with supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm transplanting instructions and activities with supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm transplanting instructions and activities with supervisor.

pcs.text: Identify workplace health and safety hazards, assess risks and report to supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify workplace health and safety hazards, assess risks and report to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify workplace health and safety hazards, assess risks and report to supervisor.

pcs.text: Confirm with supervisor location of underground and above ground services
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm with supervisor location of underground and above ground services?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm with supervisor location of underground and above ground services.

pcs.text: Prepare and use tools and equipment appropriate to the task
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare and use tools and equipment appropriate to the task?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare and use tools and equipment appropriate to the task.

pcs.text: Select, fit and use personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to the task
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, fit and use personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to the task?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, fit and use personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to the task.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare for tree or shrub removal

elements.title: Prepare tree or shrub and undertake earthworks for removal

pcs.text: Prepare crown as required by species and time of removal
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare crown as required by species and time of removal?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare crown as required by species and time of removal.

pcs.text: Clear and water site prior to transplanting
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clear and water site prior to transplanting?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clear and water site prior to transplanting.

pcs.text: Confirm root ball width and depth with supervisor to ensure root system can colonise new ground
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm root ball width and depth with supervisor to ensure root system can colonise new ground?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm root ball width and depth with supervisor to ensure root system can colonise new ground.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Prepare tree or shrub and undertake earthworks for removal

elements.title: Remove tree or shrub from original site

pcs.text: Excavate soil around the root zone
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Excavate soil around the root zone?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Excavate soil around the root zone.

pcs.text: Prune tree roots where required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prune tree roots where required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prune tree roots where required.

pcs.text: Stabilise tree as root system is undercut and apply anti-transpirants as a root soak or foliar spray to ensure viability of plant is maintained
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Stabilise tree as root system is undercut and apply anti-transpirants as a root soak or foliar spray to ensure viability of plant is maintained?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Stabilise tree as root system is undercut and apply anti-transpirants as a root soak or foliar spray to ensure viability of plant is maintained.

pcs.text: Bind root ball with appropriate material to ensure adequate soil is retained and kept moist prior to transportation and installation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Bind root ball with appropriate material to ensure adequate soil is retained and kept moist prior to transportation and installation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Bind root ball with appropriate material to ensure adequate soil is retained and kept moist prior to transportation and installation.

pcs.text: Lift tree and secure for potential storage or transportation using safe manual lifting techniques
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Lift tree and secure for potential storage or transportation using safe manual lifting techniques?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Lift tree and secure for potential storage or transportation using safe manual lifting techniques.

pcs.text: Prepare and handle tree or shrub to minimise damage during handling and transportation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare and handle tree or shrub to minimise damage during handling and transportation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare and handle tree or shrub to minimise damage during handling and transportation.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain transplanted plant with regular aftercare activities appropriate to requirements of the species.

pcs.text: Report work outcomes and malfunctions, faults, wear or damage of tools to supervisor

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Report work outcomes and malfunctions, faults, wear or damage of tools to supervisor.
